title: Compart Corporation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Compart Corporation''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]]-run corporation that was based on [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], a colony [[Planet/Legends|world]] in [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan Space]]. It mass-produced various types of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] circuitry and components. One of its developments was the circuitry used to manufacture [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]], an important element in the development process of droids.

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1996-10-XXF -->''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''
